visual_features.overall_style: Clean, modern, minimalist layout with strong editorial feel. Uses a lot of white space, a single teal accent, and large photographic imagery related to wellness and spirituality. Very flat design (no heavy shadows), light and calm rather than high‑energy.
visual_features.visual_hierarchy: Hierarchy is driven by size, color, and position: (1) Large teal page title 'BLOG' centered near top is primary focal point. (2) Secondary focal point is the horizontal row of two large blog thumbnail images beneath the filters. (3) Tertiary hierarchy: navigation links in the top-right, with the active 'BLOG' link underlined. (4) Filter links 'All Posts' (teal) and 'Spirituality' (dark grey) below the title act as sub‑navigation. Color contrast (teal vs dark grey) and uppercase text are used to emphasize key elements.
visual_features.whitespace_usage: Very generous whitespace. Large vertical gaps between the global nav and the page title, and between the title/filters and the content grid. Left and right margins are wide, giving a centered content column with plenty of breathing room around images and text. Elements are not crowded; each has clear separation, which supports calm and contemplative mood.
unique_elements: Watercolor-style circular logo with a white yoga/silhouette figure, giving a spiritual, artistic brand touch.
Simple underlined active state in the top navigation and for the category filter, reinforcing minimalism.
Floating circular chat/help button in the bottom-right with teal fill and white chat icon, acting as a persistent CTA.

layout_characteristics.grid_system: Likely a centered 12‑column grid with max-width content area; blog thumbnails appear as two equal-width columns inside this grid.
layout_characteristics.layout_pattern: Standard top navigation bar with logo-left, menu-right; below that, a centered single-column content header and filters; main content uses a two-column card grid.
layout_characteristics.section_organization: From top to bottom: (1) Global header with logo and horizontal navigation. (2) Thin horizontal rule separating header from page content. (3) Centered page title 'BLOG'. (4) Inline category filter links below the title. (5) A grid of blog posts starting with a row of two wide thumbnail images; additional posts likely continue in similar rows.
layout_characteristics.alignment: Overall content is center-aligned within a wide but bounded container. Page title and filter links are center-aligned text. Nav items are right-aligned within the header bar. Imagery/grid aligns to a central vertical axis, with equal gutters between the two columns.
responsive_hints: Two-column blog grid suggests collapse to single-column on smaller screens.
Navigation is horizontal; likely collapses to a hamburger or stacked list on mobile.
Floating chat button positioned bottom-right, likely fixed so it remains visible on scroll across viewports.
layout_characteristics.content_arrangement: Linear top-to-bottom flow: fixed-height header with logo and nav; a clear separation line; a centered full-width title block; a small sub-navigation filter row; then a visually dominant two-column row of blog post images that likely repeats down the page. Each blog item starts with a large edge-to-edge image; text metadata (not visible in the crop) would logically sit directly below each image within its column.
layout_characteristics.space_allocation: Header occupies a relatively shallow vertical band, but there is a large blank area between header and title, contributing to a ~25–30% upper whitespace zone before content begins. The title/filter block is compact, after which the main content area (blog grid) uses most of the viewport height. Images are large and wide, each taking roughly 45–48% of the content width with a central gutter, giving them strong visual dominance.
layout_characteristics.content_density: Spacious editorial layout with ample breathing room. Low content density—few elements per screen, large images, and generous margins and padding. Text elements are minimal and not stacked densely.
layout_characteristics.visual_flow: Primary flow is a Z-pattern: eye starts at top-left logo, moves horizontally to the top-right navigation, drops down to the large centered 'BLOG' heading, then continues down to the category filters and horizontally across the two large post images (left to right). The persistent chat button at bottom-right acts as a secondary, peripheral focal point.

ui_patterns.visual_description: Visible button-like element is the chat bubble: a circular button (~48–56px diameter) with fully rounded edges (pill/circle), teal background (#009688) and a white outline chat icon centered inside. No visible shadow; flat or with a very subtle soft shadow at most. Any textual CTAs (e.g., 'Read More') are likely simple teal text links or rectangular buttons with 4–6px corner radius, teal fill, white text, and moderate horizontal padding (12–16px).
ui_patterns.structural_pattern: Likely implemented as <button> or <a> with role='button', sometimes wrapped in a positioned container for the floating chat action. For inline actions, simple anchor tags styled as buttons (display: inline-block) with padding and border-radius.

ui_patterns.visual_description: Blog posts are treated as large, image-first cards. Cards appear borderless with the image spanning full card width and square or slightly rounded corners (if any, likely 4px radius). Separation between cards is achieved with whitespace and column gutters rather than strong borders or shadows. Internal padding around any text below images is likely 16–24px. Visual emphasis is on the photography, supporting a calm editorial feel.
ui_patterns.structural_pattern:
Typical structure:
containing with a followed by a
with post title (h2/h3), metadata, and excerpt. Cards are arranged in a flexbox or CSS grid to form two responsive columns.

ui_patterns.visual_description: No forms visible, but consistent style would be simple, flat inputs with light grey (#E0E0E0) 1px borders, 4px corner radius, and 10–14px internal padding. Labels likely placed above inputs, left-aligned, with small/regular dark grey text. Focus state could use teal border and subtle glow. Error/success states, if implemented, would change border color and show small inline messages below fields.
ui_patterns.structural_pattern: Forms likely use stacked layout: <form> with each field in a <div class='form-group'>; <label> above <input>/<textarea>. On wider viewports, related fields might appear side-by-side via flexbox. Submit buttons styled as primary teal buttons or text links.

ui_patterns.visual_description: Horizontal top navigation bar with logo on the left and text links on the right. Links are uppercase, spaced with generous letter-spacing and horizontal gap between items. Text color is near-black (#222222). Active page ('BLOG') uses an underline and possibly teal text; inactive items are plain dark text. The bar background is white with a very subtle bottom divider line (#E0E0E0). Overall look is slim, airy, and flat.
ui_patterns.structural_pattern: Likely a <header> with a flexbox container: logo as <a> on the left, <nav> containing a <ul><li><a> structure on the right. Active state toggled via class (e.g., .active) adding border-bottom and possibly color change. On mobile, this might transform into a menu icon and a vertical list.

ui_patterns.visual_description: Two list-like patterns: (1) Top navigation items: low-density horizontal list, no dividers, relying on spacing. (2) Category filters ('All Posts', 'Spirituality'): inline text links centered under the title, with the active filter in teal and possibly bold, while others are dark grey. No bullet points; visual separation via spacing only. Blog posts themselves form a grid list of large visual items instead of traditional text rows.
ui_patterns.structural_pattern:

  • ...

with flexbox for horizontal layout. (2) Filters as another inline
    or a flex container of

heading.visual_style: Bold geometric/humanist sans-serif with clean strokes, moderate x-height, and straightforward uppercase styling for nav and page title. It appears modern and neutral rather than decorative.

body.visual_style: Clean, readable sans-serif suitable for longer text, with slightly softer curves to match the wellness theme.

spacing_system.component_padding: Typical internal padding around content blocks and cards is 16–24px (2–3 spacing units) on all sides, with smaller elements like buttons using 8–12px vertical and 16–20px horizontal padding.
spacing_system.section_margin: Vertical spacing between major sections (header to title, title to content grid) is large—approximately 48–64px (6–8 units), enhancing the open, calm aesthetic.

interaction_hints: Nav and filter links likely change color to teal and/or show thicker underlines on hover, with smooth color transition (150–200ms).
Images in blog cards may scale up slightly or increase shadow on hover to indicate clickability, again with soft easing transitions.
The floating chat button probably has a hover state that slightly lightens the teal background or adds a subtle shadow, and may use a scale(1.05) animation.
Active state for nav and filters is indicated by an underline and teal color, providing clear location awareness without heavy styling.
Any scroll-based transitions should remain subtle (e.g., gentle fade-in of cards) to maintain the calm, spiritual tone.
